title: EccKey::create() correctly flushes SRK on all error paths
description: key.rs lines 78-107: every error path after creating the SRK calls wolfTPM2_UnloadHandle via map_err before returning. This prevents transient handle leaks when GetKeyTemplate_ECC or CreateAndLoadKey fail. The map_err closure pattern is non-obvious but correct. A future contributor might simplify this to an early return and silently introduce a handle leak. Defend this pattern.
